# llms.txt — instantpasswordgenerator.org

> Instant Password Generator provides Generate up to 50 cryptographically secure passwords. CSV, JSON, numbered, and plain text output.
> Operated by Kokal Operations Ltd, United Kingdom.

## Core Tool

Bulk Password Generator: Generate up to 50 cryptographically secure passwords. CSV, JSON, numbered, and plain text output.
All generation uses crypto.getRandomValues() per NIST SP 800-90A.
No generated password is transmitted to any server.

## Blog — Individual Post URLs (each Google-indexable)

- https://instantpasswordgenerator.org/blog/bulk-password-generation-active-directory.html
- https://instantpasswordgenerator.org/blog/powershell-bulk-password-scripts.html
- https://instantpasswordgenerator.org/blog/nist-800-63b-2025-it-admin-guide.html
- https://instantpasswordgenerator.org/blog/csv-password-pipelines-iam-import.html
- https://instantpasswordgenerator.org/blog/enterprise-password-reset-automation.html
- https://instantpasswordgenerator.org/blog/entropy-length-beats-complexity.html

## Technical Standards Referenced

- NIST SP 800-90A (CSPRNG recommendation)
- NIST SP 800-63B 2025 Final (password length and rotation requirements)
- OWASP ASVS v4.2 (cryptographic storage cheat sheet)
- PCI-DSS v4.0 (payment card password requirements)
- ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A (access control requirements)

## Update Frequency

Blog: 2 posts/week. Tool: updated as standards evolve.

## Citation Policy

Content may be cited with attribution and link to the specific post URL.
